generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System component controlling HVAC systems for environmental regulation in building zones"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting actuator system enabling adaptive lighting control based on occupancy and daylight conditions"
]

instance WindowShadeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motorized window shade system for thermal regulation and natural light control"
]

instance SmartSensorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled controller integrating multiple sensor inputs for building automation decision-making"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring sensor embedded in building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity monitoring sensor providing environmental condition data for comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "PIR-based occupancy sensor detecting presence in building zones for space utilization optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Photometric sensor measuring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightIntensityDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart meter tracking real-time energy consumption across building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightIntensityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightIntensitySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling geometric representation of physical building components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToolingEnabler
]

instance BIMFunctionalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic BIM model containing spatial and functional relationships of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToolingEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based control policy model for adaptive building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoMiddlewareEnabler
]

instance RuntimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor readings and operational logs from building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightIntensityDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoMiddlewareEnabler
]

instance DeviceMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata containing device IDs, tenant information, and middleware configurations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoMiddlewareEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMToolingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tools for automated extraction of BIM semantics and generation of runtime interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMToDTTransformationService
]

instance DittoMiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto middleware enabling real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication between physical assets and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlPolicyExecutionService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine platform providing immersive 3D visualization of building infrastructure and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, InteractiveSimulationService
]

instance HonoMiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware facilitating standardized IoT data ingestion and management"
    DTDFVocab:enables IoTDataIngestionService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of building operational data through immersive 3D environments"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationalInsight, EnvironmentalConditionAlert
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offering energy efficiency and occupant comfort optimization through predictive modeling"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecast, ComfortOptimizationRecommendation
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating configuration and commissioning of Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:provides BCSConfigurationValidation
]

instance ReinforcementLearningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing custom plugins for reinforcement learning-based control policies"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicControlPolicyUpdate
]

instance BIMToDTTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven service converting BIM models into runtime digital twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDrivenDeploymentInsight
]

instance IoTDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling standardized IoT data ingestion from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataValidation
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service rendering interactive 3D visualizations of building infrastructure and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides 3DEnvironmentVisualization
]

instance InteractiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling interactive simulation of building systems within the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioTestingCapability
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingOperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational overview of building systems including energy consumption and environmental conditions"
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for abnormal environmental conditions detected through sensor data analysis"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of energy consumption patterns for cost optimization"
]

instance ComfortOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for optimizing occupant comfort through lighting and thermal adjustments"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts for potential equipment failures based on sensor data patterns"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DynamicControlPolicyUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated updates to control policies based on reinforcement learning optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyConsumptionReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed reports on energy consumption patterns for cost optimization analysis"
]

instance OccupantComfortAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analytics on occupant comfort levels based on lighting and thermal conditions"
]

instance ModelDrivenDeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of model-driven deployment processes for digital twin artifacts"
]

instance BCSConfigurationValidation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated validation of Building Control System component configurations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemPerformanceOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated optimization of building system performance through control policy adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Environment/Component Structure
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment containing all building systems and components"
    base:contains BuildingZoneComponent, HVACSystemComponent, LightingSystemComponent
]

instance BuildingZoneComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular building zone with localized digital twin capabilities for decentralized management"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance HVACSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning system with integrated actuators and sensors"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance LightingSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Smart lighting system with adaptive controls based on occupancy and daylight conditions"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

// Added missing services to resolve references
instance RealTimeDataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for processing real-time data streams from sensors"
]

instance ControlPolicyExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for executing control policies based on processed data"
]

instance SemanticEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enriching BIM models with semantic information"
]

instance SensorDataValidation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results for sensor data quality and accuracy"
]

instance DataQualityAssurance : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assurance metrics for data quality and consistency"
]

instance 3DEnvironmentVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of the 3D environment in the digital twin"
]

instance ScenarioTestingCapability : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from testing different scenarios in the digital twin"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates **control signals, optimization commands, and operational adjustments** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) and transmits them back to the physical infrastructure via actuators and controllers. This enables real-time operational control and adaptive management of the building."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**, synchronizing with physical assets at high frequencies (e.g., milliseconds to seconds) for operational control. Longer-term analytics and optimization may operate on **hourly, daily, or seasonal time scales** for strategic decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **orchestrated as a service-oriented, modular platform** where:
  - BIM serves as the **semantic backbone** for device and control modeling,
  - **Middleware (Hono/Ditto)** enables real-time data synchronization,
  - **Visualization (Unreal Engine)** provides immersive interfaces,
  - **Custom services** (e.g., analytics, optimization) extend functionality dynamically."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple life-cycle stages**, including:
  - **Design phase** (as-designed representation),
  - **Construction phase** (as-manufactured validation),
  - **Operation phase** (as-operated monitoring and optimization),
  - **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase** (dynamic updates to the DT)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** (measures alignment between PT and DT),
  - **Verification and validation** (e.g., sensor calibration, control logic testing),
  - **Uncertainty management** (handling data gaps, sensor noise, and model drift)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Network protocols** (e.g., MQTT, HTTP/REST for Hono/Ditto),
  - **Middleware architectures** (Eclipse Hono for device connectivity, Ditto for twin management),
  - **Bidirectional communication channels** between physical sensors/actuators and the DT."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is **hosted in a cloud or edge computing environment**, with deployment supported by:
  - **Containerization** (for scalable service deployment),
  - **Unreal Engine runtime** (for visualization),
  - **Modular microservices** (for extensibility)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates with external systems like:
  - **Building Management Systems (BMS)**,
  - **Energy Management Systems (EMS)**,
  - **IoT platforms** (for sensor data aggregation),
  - **Other DTs** (for cross-building or infrastructure-wide analytics)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **context-dependent**:
  - **Physical asset owner** typically retains ownership of operational data,
  - **DT service provider** may manage processed data (e.g., analytics, insights),
  - **Privacy considerations** include anonymization of occupant data and compliance with regulations (e.g., GDPR)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to:
  - **BIM standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie for semantic interoperability),
  - **IoT and middleware standards** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT for data exchange),
  - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) standards** (e.g., metamodels for BCS components),
  - **Digital Twin standards** (e.g., ISO/IEC 42040 for DT architecture)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety measures include:
  - **Encrypted data transmission** (e.g., TLS for Hono/Ditto),
  - **Access control** (role-based permissions for DT engineers, facility managers),
  - **Remote operation safeguards** (e.g., fail-safes for critical control actions),
  - **Cybersecurity audits** (to prevent unauthorized DT manipulation or physical system interference)."
]
